name: Brie Walnut Spread (Eb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the brie and cream cheese into a food processor.
2. Add the Kirsch liquor to the food processor.
3. Pulse the mixture until well combined.
4. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
5. Transfer the spread to an airtight container.
6. Store in the refrigerator.
